title: senecio rossianus
intro: Senecio rossianus, also known as Russian flame or burning floss flower, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family native to Russia and parts of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant contains compounds with potential health benefits, such as hepatoprotection, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities, which may help to protect against liver damage, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Senecio rossianus is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for medicinal use.
